log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kender — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kender — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Kender — Unarmored Caster HP: 48/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Kender — Unarmored Caster HP: 35/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Kender — Unarmored Caster HP: 17/67
--- Kender — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 17/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
